texto: He wanted to tell her, from the greater perspective he had, that to own only a little talent, like his, was an awful, plaguing thing; that being only a little special meant you expected too much, most of the time, and liked yourself too little. He wanted to assure her that she had missed nothing
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Robison: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “He wanted to tell her, from the greater perspective he had, that to own only a little talent, lik…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, expectation, vida pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de vida e talent.
